name: l2_static_airframe_rotational_damping_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRotationalDampingRunMatrix records compact execution status for rotational damping body-rate cases and skips them until A4MC supports rotational flow requests.
note: Reference surface for future live rotational damping run summaries.

name: l2_static_airframe_rotational_damping_sweep_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRotationalDampingSweepPlan supplies the 24 positive and negative pitch yaw and roll body-rate targets.
note: Input sweep plan for rotational damping run status.

name: l2_bridge_force_moment
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge can run static force moment L2 requests but currently has no rotational velocity-field or moving-boundary request surface.
note: Bridge capability boundary for rotational damping evidence.

name: l2_runtime_retune_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRuntimeRetuneReadinessGate keeps runtime preset mutation blocked until this rotational evidence exists.
note: Downstream gate requiring rotational evidence.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future rotational L2 force moment runs.
note: Upstream live CFD target for future rotational damping evidence.
